contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Split the single "Email Agent suggestions" Gmail label into 4 purpose-specific                                                  
    labels (AI/Follow-up, AI/Warm-up, AI/Sent Follow-up, AI/Sent Warm-up) so the                                                    
    review queue on mobile Gmail stays limited to unsent drafts, while sent                                                         
    history remains categorized for future training data.                                                                           
                                                                                                                                    
    Deliverables:                                                                                                                   
    - suggest_manager_followup_drafts.py → tags drafts AI/Follow-up                                                                 
    - suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py → tags drafts AI/Warm-up                                                                    
    - sync_email_agent_followup.py → ensures all 4 labels exist; auto-swaps                                                         
      review label → matching sent label each run                                                                                   
    - relabel_existing_drafts.py → one-off migrated 66 existing drafts (60                                                          
      warmup + 6 followup) to the new labels                                                                                        
    - label_historical_sent.py → one-off backfilled 27 historical sent messages                                                     
      (24 followup + 3 warmup) by matching Email Agent Follow Up rows against                                                       
      protocol_version in Email Agent Suggestions                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                    
    Commits:                                                                                                                        
    https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/commit/9b733720d995065315144bc71e69b99614d135d9                                    
    https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/commit/5803681177bbb12f07dd40b47ade403474bd59d9
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: None (proof: links in description)
- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
